name: orbit-change-guardian
description: AI Copilot that predicts blast radius, deployment risk and review strategy for GitLab Merge Requests using the Orbit knowledge graph

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
